count_calling_company_events.reason: Calling-company event count is SELECT-only companion to list_calling_company_events and shares the search predicate contract.

list_calling_company_events.reason: Calling-company event search/count list is SELECT-only but has text search, pagination, JSON payload, and runtime-row contracts not in smoke.

list_calling_company_history.reason: Calling-company history is SELECT-only but includes JSON snapshot payloads whose text/jsonb shape must be adapted and tested.

list_company_routing_setting_history.reason: Routing-setting history is SELECT-only over routing_events but needs event/history shape fixtures and PostgreSQL row semantics.

list_phone_history.reason: Route phone link history SELECT uses SQLite placeholders/integers and still lacks PostgreSQL semantic fixtures.

list_route_history.reason: Route change history is SELECT-only but uses history table shape not covered by PostgreSQL smoke.

list_tariff_history.reason: Tariff history is SELECT-only with ordering and row shape needing PostgreSQL fixtures.

infrastructure_or_mixed.transaction: Transaction context manager controls commit/rollback boundaries and is not a read surface.

add_phone_to_route.reason: Audited public Repository method can mutate database/application state through direct SQL writes, commit/rollback, private change-log helpers, or public write-method calls; Stage 44 does not adapt write paths.

add_phone_to_route_by_number.reason: Mixed read/write method: performs a read first but can call public write methods on the miss/update branch.
